summary: Kang Seokjun visits Moon's Capital to pay off his father's massive debt, stunning the staff with his ability to settle the billions won. Afterward, he checks his status, noting significant power increases from his gear, and receives a new quest to find General Gerard. Meanwhile, discussions among staff at Quincesa highlight rumors about the mysterious 'MeleeGod' and Seokjun prepares for an upcoming arena event.
key_moments: Kang Seokjun arrives at Moon's Capital to repay his father's debt of billions.
Seokjun reviews his boosted stats and receives a quest involving General Gerard.
Quincesa staff discuss the disappearance of the legendary player 'MeleeGod' while Seokjun arranges to join an upcoming arena episode.
